inputs.label: Solute Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the solute (substance being dissolved).

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of the solute (substance being dissolved).
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen des gelösten Stoffes (Substanz, die gelöst wird).

inputs.label: Solution Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the solution (solute + solvent).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of the solution (solute + solvent).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume total de la solution (soluté + solvant).
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen total de la solución (soluto + disolvente).

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature at which volumes are measured. Not used in calculation; ensure volumes are at same temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature at which volumes are measured. Not used in calculation; ensure volumes are at same temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hacimlerin ölçüldüğü sıcaklık. Hesaplamada kullanılmaz; hacimlerin aynı sıcaklıkta olduğundan emin olun.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur, bei der die Volumina gemessen werden. Nicht in der Berechnung verwendet; stellen Sie sicher, dass die Volumina bei gleicher Temperatur sind.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température à laquelle les volumes sont mesurés. Non utilisée dans le calcul ; assurez-vous que les volumes sont à la même température.

inputs.label: Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Ambient pressure. Not used for incompressible liquids.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ambient pressure. Not used for incompressible liquids.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortam basıncı. Sıkıştırılamaz sıvılar için kullanılmaz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umgebungsdruck. Nicht für inkompressible Flüssigkeiten verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression ambiante. Non utilisée pour les liquides incompressibles.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
